outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected: Spot at Gamma Flip with massive 0DTE Call OI creates pinning risk, while negative GEX structure amplifies directional moves.
outlook.summary: Market is extremely Call-heavy with no Put protection visible. Spot has breached the structural 680 resonance level and is testing the massive 685 0DTE Call Wall. Dealers are likely short gamma, forcing them to chase price upward (buying) or accelerate selling if 680 fails. The absence of Put open interest creates asymmetric downside risk.

levels.motivazione: Massive 66,893 OI concentration in 0DTE. Spot is effectively at this strike (685.16). This is the primary pinning zone for the session. Dealer hedging flows will be most violent here.

Significant Call Open Interest across ALL expiries (0DTE: 8200, W1: 6988, W2: 3626, M1: 2428, M2: 648). This is the structural ceiling for the entire option chain. Since Spot is above, it acts as critical support.
System calculated Gamma Flip exactly at Spot. Indicates a transition zone where dealer gamma exposure shifts. With negative total GEX, this suggests dealers are short gamma, amplifying volatility.
High 0DTE OI (34,033) creating immediate friction just below the main wall. Acts as a micro-support within the pinning zone.
Heavy OI in 0DTE (909) and WEEKLY_1 (1500). Secondary structural support if the 680 level fails.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH: Spot at gamma flip with massive call concentration. Directional volatility expected.
outlook.summary: Market at critical equilibrium. Strike 610 shows RESONANCE across all 5 expirations (62K+ OI) creating powerful magnet effect. Resistance above at 612-615. Break below 610 risks downside acceleration. Directional move imminent.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI across ALL 5 expirations (62K+ contracts). Highest OI in 4 expirations. Dealers short calls create powerful magnetic attraction.
Spot exactly at gamma flip. Critical equilibrium point. Break above/below determines next directional move with high probability.
CONFLUENCE: Strong Call OI in 0DTE (31K) + WEEKLY_2 (17K). Top 2 strike in both. Dealer hedging creates resistance.
Multi-expiry Call OI confluence: 0DTE (9.3K), WEEKLY_1 (8.7K #2 strike), WEEKLY_2 (2.1K). Key structural support.
Heavy 0DTE Call OI (24K contracts). #4 strike. Strong resistance zone. Dealer short gamma accelerates selling pressure.
Key psychological level with consistent OI across WEEKLY and MONTHLY expirations (2.5K+ in 3 expiries). Strong bid zone.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated - price at gamma equilibrium point with zero GEX, directional breakout imminent
outlook.summary: Price pinned at multi-expiry gamma flip (0DTE+WEEKLY_1+WEEKLY_2). Call-heavy positioning below spot creates structural support, but near-zero total GEX indicates volatile conditions. All significant OI clusters are below spot - dealers short calls provide underlying bid. Watch 6795 for intraday direction confirmation.

levels.motivazione: Multi-expiry gamma equilibrium (0DTE+WEEKLY_1+WEEKLY_2). Critical pivot where dealer hedging dynamics reverse. Spot currently at exact flip level - high probability of directional move.
Highest OI concentration in entire dataset (504 contracts MONTHLY_2). Dealers short calls create magnetic pull - major structural support target.
Multi-expiry volume cluster across WEEKLY_2 (VOL 82), MONTHLY_1 (VOL 82), MONTHLY_2 (OI 56). Three-expiry alignment creates strong support confluence.
Highest 0DTE volume strike (243 contracts) just 1% below spot. Intraday friction zone - first support test on pullback.
Highest WEEKLY_2 volume strike (345 contracts). Secondary support between 6795 and 6650 confluence.
Only visible PUT OI in dataset (10 contracts MONTHLY_1). Distant overhead resistance - minimal immediate impact.
